description: AlphaFold pLDDT profile showing domain architecture of MEFV confirming absence of RING domain
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Re-download the PDB for visualization
af_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-O15553-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_response = requests.get(af_url)
pdb_text = pdb_response.text

# Parse all CA atoms with pLDDT
ca_data = []
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and ' CA ' in line:
        try:
            resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
            resname = line[17:20].strip()
            bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
            ca_data.append((resnum, resname, bfactor))
        except:
            pass

residues = np.array([d[0] for d in ca_data])
plddt = np.array([d[2] for d in ca_data])

# Create comprehensive pLDDT profile with domain annotations
fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [3, 1]})

# Top panel: pLDDT profile
ax1.fill_between(residues, plddt, alpha=0.3, color='steelblue')
ax1.plot(residues, plddt, linewidth=0.8, color='steelblue')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='pLDDT=70 (confident)')
ax1.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='pLDDT=50 (low confidence)')

# Mark domain boundaries
domains = [
    ('Pyrin\n(PYD)', 1, 92, '#9b59b6', 'No RING here\n(0 Cys, 3 His)'),
    ('Disordered\nlinker', 93, 369, '#e0e0e0', 'No hidden\ndomain'),
    ('B-box\n(Zn finger)', 370, 412, '#3498db', '4 Cys + 4 His\n(Zn binding,\nnot E3 catalysis)'),
    ('CC', 413, 442, '#95a5a6', ''),
    ('Helical\nscaffold', 443, 579, '#f39c12', ''),
    ('B30.2/\nSPRY', 580, 775, '#2ecc71', 'Cargo\nrecognition'),
]

for name, start, end, color, note in domains:
    ax1.axvspan(start, end, alpha=0.15, color=color)
    mid = (start + end) / 2
    ax1.text(mid, 102, name, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
    if note:
        ax1.text(mid, -8, note, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=6, color='darkred', style='italic')

ax1.set_ylim(-15, 110)
ax1.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('MEFV/Pyrin (TRIM20) AlphaFold Structure Confidence\n'
              'No RING domain present — E3 ubiquitin ligase annotation is unsupported', 
              fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.legend(loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# Bottom panel: Domain architecture comparison
ax2.set_xlim(0, 800)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 2.5)

# MEFV architecture
y_mefv = 1.8
ax2.barh(y_mefv, 781, height=0.4, color='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='#bdc3c7')
for name, start, end, color, _ in domains:
    ax2.barh(y_mefv, end-start, left=start, height=0.4, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.text(-5, y_mefv, 'MEFV/TRIM20\n(no RING)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='red')

# Canonical TRIM (e.g., TRIM21) architecture for comparison
y_trim = 0.6
ax2.barh(y_trim, 475, height=0.4, color='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='#bdc3c7')
trim21_domains = [
    ('RING', 16, 55, '#e74c3c'),
    ('B-box', 92, 123, '#3498db'),
    ('CC', 130, 233, '#95a5a6'),
    ('B30.2/SPRY', 268, 465, '#2ecc71'),
]
for name, start, end, color in trim21_domains:
    ax2.barh(y_trim, end-start, left=start, height=0.4, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    mid = (start+end)/2
    ax2.text(mid, y_trim, name, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6, color='white', fontweight='bold')

ax2.text(-5, y_trim, 'TRIM21\n(has RING)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='green')

# Arrow showing RING → Pyrin replacement
ax2.annotate('RING → Pyrin\n(domain replacement)', 
             xy=(40, y_mefv-0.2), xytext=(40, y_trim+0.4),
             fontsize=7, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold',
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5))

ax2.set_xlabel('Amino acid position', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('alphafold_plddt_profile.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("AlphaFold pLDDT profile saved.")
